description: Regie is an AI sales engagement platform that unifies calling, email, and social outreach, using AI agents to research leads and personalize prospecting.
overview: Regie combines calling, email, and social outreach in one platform, using AI agents to handle lead research and prioritization and to personalize messaging at scale.
what_is: Regie is an AI sales engagement platform that brings calling, email, and social outreach into a single hub. AI agents take on repetitive work like lead research and prioritization, so teams can replace several point tools with one and keep outreach consistent.

It is strongest across inbound and outbound, website-visitor engagement, and account-based programs, lifting both the quality and volume of outreach. Sales development reps and leaders tend to see value within days of setup.

Regie integrates with CRM, enrichment, dialing, and intent-data tools to fit the GTM stack. It streamlines and automates prospecting rather than replacing a core CRM or full marketing-automation system.
